cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out between what times Steven could have gone to the gas station. First, let me list out all the given information. Steven woke up at 7am. That's the earliest we know he was up. Then, Ashley saw Steven stretching at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So he was at the yoga studio during that time. So he couldn't have gone to the gas station during those hours because he was there from 7am to 10am. So that rules out option A (7am to 10am). Then William saw Steven at the library from 1pm to 2pm. So between 1pm and 2pm, he was reading. So he couldn't go to the gas station during that hour. Then Jennifer saw Steven working at the office from 2pm to 3pm.
